nasb.text: Then Saul said to his servant, “Well said; come, let us go.” So they went to the city where the man of God was.

esv.text: And Saul said to his servant, “Well said; come, let us go.” So they went to the city where the man of God was.

cnv.text: 掃羅對僕人說：“你說的好。來，我們去吧！”於是他們到那神人所住的城裡去。

ccb.text: 扫罗说：“好，我们去吧。”于是，他们前往上帝仆人住的城。
